mapper.select: /* PV 수익 조회 */ select round( (net_gen_val*rec_weight) , 2) as rec_deal, net_gen_val as smp_deal, gen_revn_idx, site_id, gen_type, std_timestamp, std_date, meter_read_day, smp_rate, rec_rate, rec_weight, produce_val, consume_val, net_gen_val, smp_price, rec_price, tot_price, reg_date, mod_date from tb_gen_revenue where gen_type = '1' and site_id = #{siteId } and std_date between str_to_date(#{selTermFrom },'%Y%m%d%H%i%s') and str_to_date(#{selTermTo },'%Y%m%d%H%i%s') order by std_date

/* PV 수익 명세서 조회 */ select round( (net_gen_val*rec_weight) , 2) as rec_deal, net_gen_val as smp_deal, gen_revn_idx, site_id, gen_type, std_timestamp, std_date, meter_read_day, smp_rate, rec_rate, rec_weight, produce_val, consume_val, net_gen_val, smp_price, rec_price, tot_price, reg_date, mod_date from tb_gen_revenue where gen_type = '1' and site_id = #{siteId } and std_date between #{startDay } and #{endDay } order by std_date
